overview: A professional, real-time crypto trading dashboard and control panel for a live trading bot. Monitors BTC, ETH, and SOL positions with live Binance prices, global kill switches, PnL charts, and trade history — styled like UltraTrader with a dark glassmorphism aesthetic.
features: Real-time asset cards with live Binance prices for BTC, ETH, SOL
Global and per-asset kill switch controls with optimistic UI
Position visualization bar (SL → Entry → TP1 → TP2) with animated price marker
Stats overview: Realized PNL, Win Rate, Balance, Live PNL
Cumulative PnL line chart and daily PnL bar chart
Recently closed trades table with pagination and sorting
Per-asset deep view with micro charts and performance stats
Auto-refresh every 3 seconds with smooth transitions
Dark glassmorphism design with electric blue and neon green accents
Responsive layout: sidebar nav on desktop, bottom nav on mobile
